assertions.assertion: Uses JsonWebTokenHandler.ReadJsonWebToken (or JwtSecurityTokenHandler) to parse the access token string
Asserts the client_id claim matches the test client's ID
Asserts the scope claim contains the expected scope value
Asserts the issuer (iss) claim matches the expected authority URL
Does NOT make a network call to validate the token -- parses it locally
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 9 explicitly states 'Parse without validation' and uses ReadJsonWebToken locally
